title: radermachera pinnata subsp. acuminata
intro: Radermachera pinnata subsp. acuminata, also known as the Malaytea or Malay tea tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Radermachera pinnata subsp. acuminata include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
